channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mexico Seeks Prosecutions Over Deaths in U.S. After Fatal ICE Shooting
item.description: Mexico's government has strongly criticized the treatment of its citizens under President Trump's push to increase deportations.

item.title: Former Epoch Times CFO pleads guilty in $67 million money laundering case
item.description: The former chief financial officer of The Epoch Times halted jury selection to plead guilty in a money laundering case.

item.title: EasyJet accepts Apollo takeover bid, surpassing Castlerock offer
item.description: British budget airline EasyJet has agreed in principle to a £5.7 billion takeover by U.S. private equity firm Apollo.

item.title: Eight suspects indicted in alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
item.description: Eight men have been indicted for their alleged roles in a plot to attack a UFC event at the White House last month.
